product.name: LotusPath
product.tagline: AI-Powered University Admission Prediction for Vietnamese Students
product.description: A bilingual (Vietnamese/English) AI platform that predicts the likelihood of Vietnamese students being accepted into universities worldwide, and provides long-term, evolving guidance for middle school students working toward their target institutions.
product.target_market: Vietnamese K–12 students, parents, and education consultants

goals: Accurately predict university admission likelihood using structured student academic profiles
Provide per-university percentage scores and confidence intervals
Offer personalized, evolving roadmaps for middle school students targeting specific universities
Keep predictions current by incorporating yearly intake and median score changes
Serve both Vietnamese and English-speaking users with full feature parity

primary.name: University Admission Predictor
primary.description: Accepts student academic inputs and returns ranked university admission likelihood scores with confidence levels.

required.description: SAT composite score (Evidence-Based Reading & Writing + Math)

optional.description: List of extracurricular activities, leadership roles, awards, and community service
TOEFL iBT total score (alternative to IELTS)
AP or IB courses taken with scores
Preferred destination countries (e.g. US, UK, Australia, Canada)

per_university.description: Predicted admission likelihood as a percentage (0–100)
Model confidence based on data availability for that institution
Median SAT, GPA, and IELTS of admitted students for comparison
Per-metric delta between student scores and median admits
AI-generated contextual commentary in user's selected language

primary.data_refresh: University median stats and acceptance rates updated annually from official sources and scraped data

secondary.name: Middle School University Roadmap
secondary.description: Generates a personalized, multi-year academic and extracurricular plan for middle school students (grades 6–9) targeting a specific university, updated yearly as intake data changes.

inputs.description: Current subjects or activities where student excels

outputs.description: Year-by-year plan from current grade through grade 12, including recommended classes, target scores per standardized test, and suggested extracurriculars
Suggested GPA, SAT/ACT, IELTS targets by grade
Suggested AP/IB/honors courses and when to take them
Recommended clubs, competitions, volunteer work, and leadership opportunities
Plan is recalibrated each year based on updated university intake data and student progress

database.primary: Firebase Firestore (user profiles, saved predictions, roadmaps)
database.vector_store: Zilliz (university embeddings, semantic similarity search for peer institutions)

llm_routing.purpose: Route inference requests across multiple LLM providers for cost and latency optimization

primary_llm.purpose: Core admission prediction reasoning, gap analysis narrative, roadmap generation, and embedding university profiles

ai_orchestration.purpose: Visual workflow orchestration for multi-step prediction pipelines (data retrieval → embedding lookup → LLM reasoning → output formatting)

web_search.purpose: Semantic search for up-to-date university admission statistics, acceptance rates, and class profile data

mobile_app.purpose: Wrap the web app as a native mobile application for iOS and Android distribution in Vietnam

realtime_communication.purpose: In-app video/voice consultations between students and education advisors

voice_ui.purpose: Vietnamese and English text-to-speech for accessibility and audio summaries of prediction results

university_database.description: Curated, annually-refreshed dataset of university admission profiles
initial_scope: United States (Top 200 universities including Ivy League, state schools, test-optional)
data_sources: University official admissions pages (scraped via Bright Data + ByteRover)

prediction_model.approach: Hybrid: embedding-based similarity (Zilliz) + LLM reasoning (OpenAI via OpenRouter)
steps: 1. Embed student profile into a vector representation using text-embedding-3-large
2. Retrieve top-k most similar historical admitted student profiles from Zilliz vector store
3. Compute baseline probability from similarity scores and historical admission rates
4. Pass student profile + retrieved context + university stats to GPT-4o for reasoning-augmented probability refinement
5. Generate gap analysis, verdict (Safety/Match/Reach), and localized narrative commentary
6. Return structured JSON response consumed by frontend
prediction_model.confidence_calculation: Based on number of Vietnamese student data points available for that university — more data = higher confidence
prediction_model.extracurricular_weighting: LLM holistic evaluation of extracurriculars mapped to university-stated selection criteria where available

user_stories.story: As a Vietnamese high school student, I want to enter my SAT, IELTS, and GPA and receive a ranked list of universities I'm likely to be admitted to, so I can make informed application decisions.
acceptance_criteria: System returns at least 10 universities with admission probability and confidence level
Results are displayed in Vietnamese and English
Gap analysis shows what scores I need to improve my odds

user_stories.persona: Parent of a high school student
user_stories.story: As a parent, I want to compare my child's profile against multiple universities at once and see clear Safety/Match/Reach categorization, so I can help them build a balanced school list.
acceptance_criteria: Side-by-side comparison view of multiple universities
Shareable results link or PDF export

user_stories.story: As a Grade 7 student, I want to enter my dream university and receive a year-by-year plan of what classes to take and scores to aim for, so I can start preparing early.
acceptance_criteria: Roadmap covers each academic year from current grade through Grade 12
Includes specific course recommendations and score targets
Plan updates annually when I log back in

user_stories.story: As an education consultant, I want to quickly generate predictions for multiple student profiles so I can advise my clients efficiently.
acceptance_criteria: Batch input support for multiple students
API access for integration into existing consultant tools

non_functional_requirements.performance: Prediction results returned within 10 seconds for a full university list
non_functional_requirements.accuracy: Admission probability within ±10 percentage points of actual historical outcomes on test set
non_functional_requirements.scalability: Support up to 10,000 concurrent users during peak Vietnamese application season (Oct–Dec)
non_functional_requirements.data_privacy: Student profiles stored securely in Firebase; no personally identifiable data sold or shared; PDPD (Vietnam Personal Data Protection Decree) compliant
non_functional_requirements.accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance; ElevenLabs TTS for audio accessibility

deliverables: University admission predictor for US, UK, Australia universities
Zilliz vector similarity for improved accuracy
Bright Data + Exa annual data refresh pipeline
Dify workflow orchestration for roadmap generation

required.role: Core AI predictions, embeddings, and roadmap generation

recommended.role: Vector store for university profile embeddings — core to prediction model accuracy
Semantic web search for live university admission data and annual stat refreshes
AI workflow orchestration for the multi-step prediction pipeline

optional_future.role: Structured web scraping if Exa coverage proves insufficient
